author: lOrm
content: Decision: tested validate_url SSRF/scheme behaviors via the public fetch_url/fetch_with_browser APIs rather than the private validate_url function directly. This gives stronger coverage (tests the full call stack) and avoids exposing internal symbols. The wiremock serve_body helper is present but Jina Reader proxy interception is documented as a limitation — the non-200 contract is pinned via white-box format tests instead. Two browser tests gated behind #[ignore] with OPENCLAUDIA_TEST_BROWSER=1 env opt-in.
